items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

🎬 CASTING CALL – COMEDY SHORT FILM (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Our team of industry professionals is coming together to create a fun, high-quality comedy short film, giving actors and performers the opportunity to gain experience and work on set with an experienced creative team.

We are currently seeking extras for multiple scenes filming in Miami and Hollywood, FL.

ROLES NEEDED:

• BEACH CHAIR MAN – Male, any ethnicity, age 30–60. Will appear in comedic beach sequence lying in beach chair next to lead actor.

• BEACH WOMEN – Two women, age range 20s–40s, attractive beachgoer types for comedic visual scene at the beach.

• LATIN RESTAURANT EXTRAS – Men and women, all ethnicities, age range 20s–60s. Patrons, dancers, and background characters for lively Miami Latin restaurant/bar scene.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Locations: Miami, FL & Hollywood Beach, FL
📅 Shoot Dates: June, Exact dates TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Comfortable working in lively comedy environment
• Some extras may be featured prominently on camera

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot/photo, age, current location, and contact information to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Extras Submission

Serious and available talent only.

Here's a polished casting call post:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – AUE PRODUCTION COMPANY** 🎬

AUE Production Company is now casting for an exciting new television series produced and directed by **Jana Sullivan**.

Jana Sullivan is the writer and producer of *Another Man's Treasure*, which debuted on Tubi, and the author of several successful book series, including numerous ghostwritten works.

We are currently seeking talented actors for a brand-new gritty television series that is set to debut on Tubi. This powerful and groundbreaking series is ready to change the game! We are located in Cincinnati Ohio

Interested actors should submit:

✅ A short bio

✅ A short monologue

Send submissions to: **[actupentemail@gmail.com](mailto:actupentemail@gmail.com)**

Or inbox us directly on Messenger.

Serious inquiries only. We are looking for dedicated talent ready to bring unforgettable characters to life.

#CastingCall #ActorsWanted #TVSeries #Tubi #AUEProductionCompany #JanaSullivan #Auditions #ActingOpportunity

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL & CREW CALL

Hi everyone,
I’m am the co director/ co producer of the upcoming student proof of concept, ‘Canary’.
We are looking for cast and crew for this film. We plan to shoot this film on August 10-August 14 in Sydney, Australia . It would be mostly unpaid, but catering services will be provided along with credit and final cuts of the film. We are open to paying compensation for sound, but cannot adhere to daily rates as this is a student production. If you want to be a part of a female led story and production, nows your time to make this happen!

If interested, please email me 
mp4.allish@gmail.com

SUBMISSIONS CLOSE FRIDAY 5TH JUNE, 2026

items.text:
THE BIGGEST MISTAKE WITH ACTING CLASSES YOU NEED TO KNOW
There’s a common problem in most acting training that no one really talks about.

And it’s what keeps a lot of actors STUCK for years, wasting time and money.

Most acting training focuses on FEEDBACK.

But feedback doesn’t make you a consistently better actor.

I was explaining this to an actor recently using a simple analogy.

If you’re trying to shoot a basketball into a hoop and you keep missing, it doesn’t help if someone just says “closer,” “more energy,” or “that wasn’t it.”

What you need is the TECHNIQUE behind how to consistently get the ball through the hoop.

Acting is no different.

Actors don’t become bookable from one-off feedback.

Actors become bookable when they’re trained in a skill set that enables them to be exactly what casting directors are looking for in every audition.

For context, I’ve been working as an actor for 18 years across film, television, and stage.

My credits include series regular roles in two Netflix productions, six feature films in lead roles, Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood, and Wendy Darling in ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

I’ve taken what works in practice and developed a structured approach that builds CONFIDENCE, CONSISTENCY, and ultimately leads to BOOKING work.

I’m curious. Is this something you’ve noticed too? Let me know in the comments below. 

DM me “ACTING” if you’re putting in the work but not seeing consistent results, and want to understand the simple technique that gets you booked.

items.text: Go behind the scenes of Hollywood’s golden age of voice over with legendary voice actor, coach, and demo producer Marc Graue. Tales From The Hollywood Voice Over Vault features unforgettable stories, rare behind-the-scenes moments, celebrity encounters, studio adventures, and lessons learned from decades in the entertainment industry. New episodes drop every week, taking you inside the world of voice over like never before! #voiceover #Hollywood #BehindTheScenesa ##HollywoodStories #voiceactor #marcgraue #legendary #voiceovercoach #studiostories #voice

items.text:
‼️ WARSZAWA 16 lub 18 CZERWCA ‼️
Na plan trzeciego sezonu kultowego serialu historycznego poszukujemy:

▪️ dziewczyn oraz chłopaków w wieku ok 16-40 lat jako wczasowiczów (można być dwa dni zdjęciowe)

▪️ 18.06 kobiet oraz mężczyzn w każdym wieku jako GAPIÓW 

Stawka w zależności od godzin na planie 100-130 gotówką po planie. 

Zgłoszenia wraz z imieniem i nazwiskiem, numerem telefonu, AKTUALNYMI zdjęciami sylwetki oraz włosów z boku oraz WYMIARAMI przyjmujemy na adres: KAROLINA@ONSETAGENCY.PL w tytule wpisując “SERIAL”

do reklamy BANK szukamy
stawka 4000pln, zdj 23.06 Warszawa

2.  
kobieta w wieku 22-25 lat  z umiejętnościami aktorskimi

ZGŁOSZENIA do 1. Hero 
mężczyźni w wieku 22-25 lat z umiejętnościami aktorskimi 
typ Gen Z, wyraziste oczy, wyraźnie zarysowana linia szczęki 
* tu szukam podobnych mężczyzn, których wybierzemy z castingu lub pary bliźniąt :)

items.text:
**We are still seeking actors ages 18 and up! Auditions are due Tuesday!**

**Project: **Cryptophasia

**Type: **Theatre

***Audition Information***

Initial auditions will be video submissions **due** **Tuesday, June 9th**. Video should consist of a 60-90 second contemporary monologue and a slate with your name, height, current location, title of your piece, and whether you are available for callbacks on June 16th.

**Callbacks, by invitation, will be held from 6-8 PM on Tuesday, June 16th** in the Forum Theatre at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial). Actors unavailable for callbacks are still encouraged to submit, and alternate arrangements will be made if needed.

**Submit Your Audition Here**: [[https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8](https://forms.gle/j4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5Irm-Jb1muA3Zx8JLaYkrg3vzH2RacBbXQhxl-t0_UEG-PDA-bZB4jx-YGBQ_aem_OvBCwmeD9pLYDsr2RKqTmg)](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=https%3A%2F%2Fforms.gle%2Fj4YqReoa7yp3uZ6m8%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExR1JUdnFtNFFlQ1BEcTdXM3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EuBRnCPWdwQ2herTFHH3ZSgRCNVerpoqS20Atm7kv1_cIR4G8eqV1Msn22Q_aem_BOhUsw5S9vorqF6DZ5sWjA&h=AUDZr-FaMO1Cy-qmuCVf8Z3eOmd_L0d7nWR_38zi_0571mVfip6dGhM0CqSDaVBFN8ITlvVj50M1nrqfieWmQZF2TG0ka9xvQqbhU6aTfJkwsmrQbVNR_6RbimctXlTHFBcN&__tn__=-UK*F)

***Dates***

**Rehearsals will be held June 25th through July 18th** on select weekdays and Saturdays. **A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *****HERE*****;** please note that final schedule will be adjusted based around actor availability, and not all actors will be called to all rehearsals.

Rehearsals will primarily be located at Koelbel Library (5955 S Holly St, Centennial)

**Tech rehearsals:** July 20th-22nd at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

**Performances:** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM, at the Three Leaches Theatre (1560 Teller Street, Lakewood).

***Compensation***

Actors will be paid a portion of profits, dependant on production netting a profit.

*Please note that this is not a project intended to make a profit for the organization or the producers, rather to bring together a group of enthusiastic creatives who want to collaborate on bringing to life an original work and creating a meaningful piece of theatre.*

***Show Synopsis***

**Cryptophasia (N)-** The phenomenon of an autonomous language developed by twins that only the two children can understand.

​

Anna and Bella Lavey, soul mates and identical twins joined at the hip, have grown up believing that they cannot live without each other. But when Anna develops a fatal heart condition, the girls are confronted with the true cost of freedom--if such a thing even exists at all. At its core, this play explores the universality of having an identity thrust upon us, one which both binds and defines us.

***Character Breakdown***

*The roles of Anna and Bella Lavey have been pre-cast.*

*Stagebugz Theatre is committed to a policy of equal employment opportunity and does not discriminate in casting practices on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other legally protected status. We actively encourage adult performers of all backgrounds, identities, and abilities to audition.*

**Mom** (*Female-identifying, 40s*)- Anna and Bella's mother. A master in pretending everything's okay; she's doing her best to give her daughters what is, in her opinion, a "normal" life.

**Favorite** (*Female-identifying, 60s-70s*)- Anna and Bella's wise, insightful grandmother. The kind of person everybody counts on to make everything better.

**Missy **(*Female-identifying or non-binary, 18+ to play ages 11 and 18*)- Anna and Bella's cousin who always speaks her mind.

**Unk/Dr. Truman** (Male*-identifying, 30s-50s*)- Actor will double as Missy's father and Anna and Bella's lifelong pediatrician.

***Production Team***

Director- Courtney Velarde

Stage Manager/Assistant Director- Mary Sullivan

Playwright- Aspen Somers

Producer- Ashley Somers

***About Us***

Stagebugz Theatre was founded by Aspen and Ashley Somers in 2021 as a 501(c)3 with the mission of creating uplifting, accessible theatre education for children. Cryptophasia is our first community-based production under our brand-new “Theatre in Flight” program, with the mission to offer a place for underrepresented theatre professionals to share their voices and develop their own projects.

For questions or to learn more, visit [www.stagebugztheatre.com](https://www.facebook.com/api/graphql/www.stagebugztheatre.com?__tn__=-UK*F) or contact stagebugztheatre@gmail.com.
items.previewDescription: Stagebugz Theatre is a 501(c)3 youth theater company dedicated to providing accessible theatre education where every performer is valued and uplifted. We offer affordable acting and musical theatre classes, productions, and summer camps, free workshops, and family-friendly performances!
items.title: Youth Theater | Stagebugz Theatre | Littleton

We are currently finalising casting for our production of Aladdin at The Corn Hall in Diss, Norfolk, this Christmas and are seeking an actor for the title role of Aladdin.

We wondered whether you may have any male-presenting clients on your books who would be interested in being considered for the role.

If you have any suitable clients, please send a headshot, showreel, and CV to ryan@sparklive.co.uk
items.title:
STAY TUNE GUYS….!

Rahat Shah,
A talented Fitness Model/Actor/Photographer and British Champion in Men’s Physique from Birmingham, UK! 

Hailing from a renowned art family in Pakistan’s film industry, Rahat’s creative genes are undeniable. With a string of achievements, including winning the British Champion award and Asians Beauty Pageant, Rahat has made a name for himself.

His upcoming Indian thriller film “Second Chance” Directed by Sachin Karande is set to release soon, promising to captivate audiences worldwide.

As a cover model for numerous magazines, Rahat’s charm and physique have won hearts. Through his journey, he aims to inspire others, proving that hard work and dedication can lead to success. Stay tuned for an exciting story of passion, talent, and triumph!

Ideally will have had previous pantomime experience. We encourage applications from performers of all ethnicities and backgrounds. INTERESTED? Email your CV with showreel to ryan@sparklive.co.uk'

items.text:
CASTING CALL – 📍London, UK.
MA FILMMAKING STUDENT SHORT FILMS

University of East London 

We are MA Filmmaking students currently casting for two upcoming short films (12–15 minutes duration) to be filmed for our major creative project.

FILM 1: GUTTER (Hindi Language)

Logline: 

With his visa expiring, an aspiring Bollywood actor faces a cruel choice: go home and pursue his dream, or remain illegally in London and sacrifice it to save his family from the gutters. 

Santhosh (Lead) Male

- Age: 20–25

- Indian

- Brown complexion

- Slim or toned physique

- Hindi speaker

Safeena (Lead) Female

- Age: 20–25

- Indian

- Brown complexion

- Slim build

- Hindi speaker

Kailash Uncle (Supporting Role)

- Age: 35–50

-  Hindi speaker

Ruben (Supporting Role)

- Age: 30–40

- Hindi speaker

Sister of Santhosh (Supporting Role)

- Age: 30–40

- Brown complexion

- Hindi speaker

FILM 2: I Think I Love You (English Language)

Logline: 

A young filmmaker who has spent her life trying to be perfect begins to confront her fear of failure through three versions of herself, and after a public breakdown, she learns to make her first film honestly and accept who she really is.

Maddie (Lead)

- Age: 22–30

- Sri Lankan, Indian, Pakistani, Middle Eastern, or similar background

- Brown or dark complexion

- Chubby build preferred

The Unnamed Woman (Lead)

- Age: 22–30

- Sri Lankan, Indian, Pakistani, Middle Eastern, or similar background

- Brown or dark complexion

- Well-groomed appearance

Adrian (Supporting Role – Professor)

- Age: 35–55

- European, American, Australian, or African background

- White, fair, or Black ethnicity

- Native or fluent English speaker

HOW TO APPLY

Please send the following:

- Headshots

- Portrait photographs

- Showreel (if available)

- A brief introduction

- The role(s) you would like to be considered for

Send applications to (both):

📧 m4dhu.s.111@gmail.com

📧 neelchampaneri09@gmail.com

Neel Champaneri 

Subject Line: Casting Application – [Role Name]

We welcome applications from both experienced and emerging actors.

Thank you, and we look forward to seeing your submissions!

After three years in Sydney, Left Leg Productions is thrilled to be back on British soil with Weird West-End! Co-Produced with The Stage Door we’ll be bringing you your favourite musical theatre anthems in weird and wonderful ways on the 8th August.

items.text:
CASTING CALL Midlands/Manchester — Paid Role

Short Film: FALLOW

We are looking for an actor for the lead role of DAVID in our short film Fallow.

Synopsis:

A farmer is slowly consumed by depression — not loudly, but in silences and short tempers that drive away the people he loves most. His wife loses faith in him. The farmhand they had come to love like a son leaves and doesn't return.

THE ROLE: DAVID

Age: 50–65

We're looking for someone with a rugged, weathered farmer's presence. Real farming experience is a big plus.

David is a man who has spent his life working his land. Beneath his rough exterior lies someone quietly drowning — his depression doesn't show in tears, but in silence, short tempers, and delusions. He is not a villain. He is a man too proud to ask for help, who slowly pushes away the farmhand keeping his world running. By the time he finds his way back to himself, the damage is already done.

Filming Location: Rural Derbyshire

Rehearsals in Manchester.

Shooting Date: August / September

Food, travel and accommodation are covered. Compensation to be discussed.

Please send headshots or Spotlight link to: Pecsatfilms@hotmail.com

Thank you.

topComments.text:
I totally fit the bill 53 ex farmer / agricultural engineer also tractor driver. 6.2 beard and a big frame(fat) also a big frame
My dads just died so I know how the character feels 
I’ll send email

I’m available mid August onwards 
This is interesting as I get the not asking for help thing look I think will suit, age good 
No farming experience but 18 years in the British Army I know about the land and pressure and to be honest snapping at the closes one to you when the pressure builds 
Many thanks x

items.text:
**CASTING CALL –** ***OMG Stories ***

Hi, my name is Mireille and I’m a Casting Agent at Upstream Media leading the search for contributors for the ongoing series ***OMG Stories: Up Close.*** We are looking for individuals with extraordinary lived experiences who would be interested in sharing their story in their own words.

**Details:**

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Shoot dates: Ongoing
💷 Paid opportunity (£££)

**Requirements:**
• All ages welcome
• All genders welcome
• Must be based in the UK or willing to travel

**If you’re interested, please send:**
• A brief summary of your story
• A video link or self-tape

📧 Email: [mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk](mailto:mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk)

items.text:
Casting Call
Chapter Three Productions are casting SHIPS, a new play premiering in Leith at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe.

We are particularly keen to hear from actors from Black,South Asian, mixed-race, and other underrepresented backgrounds for a major role central to the production.

CONNOR: Merchant seaman, mid 30s–mid 40s. Leither. A complex, emotionally demanding role exploring trauma, loneliness, addiction, identity, and the struggle to reconnect with home and self. Open auditions will be held in Edinburgh in May 2026. 

If interested, please send a CV and headshot to: shipsleith@yahoo.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of boat and text

Hey everyone! My name is Camilla Santos, im an actress based in Southern California. I’m currently looking to connect with filmmakers, casting directors, producers, and other creatives for upcoming projects, auditions, and networking opportunities.

I’m open to film, television, short films, indie projects, and new opportunities overall. Headshots, resume, and self-tapes are available if interested. Excited to connect with everyone here!

CONTACT: camillasantosactor@gmail.com

items.text:
**JOB:** Web Series — Recurring Host Role 

**CASTING:** Open gender, 25-45, strong on camera presence **LOCATION:** Long Beach, California, USA 

**COMPENSATION:** Paid — $1,000 per shoot day, rate open to discussion as series develops 

**CONTACT:** chloe@muhameds.com 

**TIME(S):** Accepting submissions now, production ongoing

Non-union. Seeking a host for a short form branded web series for a wellness and performance drink company shooting at a professional sound stage in Long Beach.

The character is knowledgeable, worldly, and genuinely curious — someone who's done the research and can't stop talking about what they found. Think less polished spokesperson, more fascinating person you met at a dinner party who happens to know everything about the history of medicinal mushrooms and isn't weird about it. Each episode covers a single functional ingredient — its origins, the science, why it matters. Scripts are provided but the right person will make them feel completely natural and uncontrived.

Background or genuine personal interest in health, wellness, nutrition, herbalism, biohacking, or related fields is a real advantage — the content will reward someone who actually finds this stuff interesting.

You are not: a supplement bro or a wellness influencer.

To apply send a short self tape video introducing yourself and why this sounds like your kind of thing. No formal reel required — just show us who you are.

**TYPE:** Non-union Commercial

**CASTING:** New Yorkers who wear prescription glasses

**LOCATION:** New York, NY

**COMPENSATION: **$700/10hr shoot day + $7500 buyout

**CONTACT:** broadcastcasting@gmail.com or use flyer QR to obtain audition instructions

**TIME(s):** shoot date range 6/2 - 6/5! Submission deadline 5/18, 4pm

**---**

**CASTING CALL** seeking local **NEW YORKERS** to feature in a commercial campaign for a major **EYEWEAR** retail chain shooting out of New York, NY. MUST wear prescription glasses + have a hobbie/job they can passionately speak about! Please see our flyer with the project details or reach out to us at broadcastcasting@gmail.com if you have any questions! **SUBMISSION DEADLINE:** Mon 18th May 2026

REQUIREMENTS Must live or work in NYC Must wear glasses Must be available June 2nd June 5th COMPENSATION: $700 per shoot date(s $7500 to cover the use SCAN THE QR CODE FOR THE AUDITION INSTRUCTIONS For more info please reach out to: broadcastcasting@gmail.com WWW.BROAD-CAST.TV'

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Filmprojekt suchen wir noch Darsteller für die Drehtage 08.06.26 und 09.06.26, gedreht wird nähe Grafenau im Bayerischen Wald. Wir brauchen noch Darsteller/innen, Komparsen, die Bewohner eines Bauerndorfes und schwarze Ritter spielen, die dieses Dorf überfallen und belagern. Ebenfalls werden noch zwei schwarze Ritter gesucht, mit Text (mit Dialog). Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße (für die Rollen mit Dialog ist ein Vorstellungsvideo erforderlich) bitte an Harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger an Harlekin Filme 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

*Casting Call!*

We need skilled and talented actors and actresses who are fluent English speakers for these roles:

- *Coach Pascal* (55, male) – University sports coach  
- *Grandmother / Mama Grace* (60s–70s)  
- *Uncle John* (30s)  
- *Tinache’s Mother* (40s) – a real “aunty” type  
- *Minister* (40s) – wedding planner  

Send your profile to Mr. Eddie on 0622634638 to receive an audition script.

*Note:* Submissions close Friday, 5 June. Auditions must be sent by Thursday, 4 June.

Thank you!

CASTING CALL: JESSICA — Supernatural Horror Feature Film

Non-Union
Rate: $200/day
Shooting location: Winnipeg, MB
Shoot dates: July 2026

Roles:
Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · must read as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · must read as 7
Olivia — Supporting · Female · must read as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s — CAST
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s — CAST

The roles of Ken and David have been cast. Please do not apply for those roles.

Role Commitments:
Susie — 12 shoot days
Jacob — 12 shoot days
Jessica — 8 shoot days
Olivia — 2 shoot days

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - EDINBURGH ‼️‼️
Hello, we are currently looking for a male actor for our student short film with Edinburgh College. We are aiming for film from the 6-9th of May and so are looking for someone who will be available within those days. 

Age - 25-26 ( Casting age - 25-27 or just an older looking 23 and above year olds.)
Identity - Straight, white, man, Scottish.
Personality - Narcissist, passionate, hot headed,
"nice" guy, controlling, and abusive.
Character Synopsis - Dany is dating a girl who discovers that her blood glows. He then discovers that he is obsessed with looking at the blood, and continues to ask his girlfriend (Bevan) to give him more of her blood. Disappointed when she can no longer produce what he wants, he leaves her.

Story Synopsis: A young girl discovers that her blood glows while harming herself. Panicked and disturbed by this discovery, she shows her boyfriend. Who, instead of having care or concern for her, starts exploiting her for her blood as he is enticed by it.
Struggling to perform and produce consistently for him, she grapples with self hate and worth, loosing grip on her mental state. Eventually, when her blood isn’t satisfactory for him anymore, he leaves her feeling worthless after sucking her dry of her youth and innocence.

If you are interested or want to know more please email our director at: ec1958677@edinburghcollege.ac.uk

We are so excited to present an amazing group of 30 models walking in not one, but two runways tomorrow at Orlando International Fashion Week 2026! @orlandofashionweek_int @starrdalton 

They will be showcasing designs from @mylittlematilda and @matildacouturedresses where we have been offering age-appropriate formal wear for all ages since 2010.

Our collections are designed as elegant formal wear you can wear to any special occasion. These are not costumes or themed outfits—they are true formal fashion pieces for every age, created to celebrate style, confidence, and timeless elegance. #mylittlematilda #oifw #orlando #florida

items.text:
Das neue Streaming Bundle für Unter uns Fans #unteruns #hbomax #rtl+ #rtlplus 

https://youtube.com/shorts/sRtW50ssRrA 

Mein Moment im Büroloft von „Unter uns“

Diese Woche durfte ich bei „Unter uns“ in den @mmcstudios Köln als Nebenrollendarsteller mit Text vor der Kamera stehen. Die Szene spielte im Büroloft zwischen Huber & Huber Bauvision und Goldberg Superior Cologne. Mehr darf ich nicht verraten.

@actpm Patrick Müller als Tobias Lassner

Patrick verkörpert seit 2006 Tobias Lassner, einen erfolgreichen Anwalt mit kühler Fassade und weichem Kern. Seine Verbindung zu Leo macht diese Figur besonders menschlich und erzählerisch stark im Ensemble.

@miriam_lahnstein Miriam Lahnstein als Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg

Miriam spielt Patrizia Neumann-Goldberg, eine selbstbewusste Unternehmerin mit Machtinstinkt, Charme und Konsequenz. Als Mutter von Stella verkörpert sie Kontrolle, Ehrgeiz und familiäre Spannung mit großer Präsenz vor der Kamera.

@harun.yildirim_official Harun Yildirim als Ferhat Gülek

Harun spielt Ferhat Gülek, Architekt, Vater von Baris und Esma sowie Noch-Ehemann von Dana. Seine Figur bringt Charme, Lebensfreude und emotionale Bewegung in die Serie und in die Schillerallee hinein.

Wertschätzung am Set

Besonders wertvoll war das ruhige, respektvolle Miteinander der UFA-Produktion. In den MMC Studios Köln spürt man Präzision, Vertrauen, Timing und Teamgeist hinter jeder Szene und jedem gemeinsamen Moment am Set.

Jetzt ansehen und dranbleiben

Wenn Ihr „Unter uns“ verfolgt, achtet gern auf diese Figuren. Die Serie läuft jeden Abend bei @rtl_de und ist auf @rtlplus streambar. Teil 2 findet Ihr im Kanal von @sandras.social.media.creation (Sandra Wötzel) zum Weiterlesen.

Christian Weiße aka @christian_weisse_digi_content

#UnterUns #RTL #RTLPlus #UFASerialDrama #MMCStudios

**PILNY CASTING!!! - ROLA DZIECIĘCA**

Bardzo pilnie, do zamkniętego serialu kryminalnego dla jednej z platform, poszukuję **CHŁOPCA w** **wieku 6-10 lat.**

Zdjęcia odbędą się w Warszawie. 

Rozpoczynają się w połowie lipca i potrwają do października 2026. 

Rola chłopca to ok. 10 dni zdjęciowych.

**Chłopiec to zapalony kibic, pełen energii łobuziak,  wysportowany i lubiący grać w piłkę nożną. **

**W zgłoszeniu bardzo proszę o przesłanie poniższych krótkich materiałów filmowych: **

1. Krótkiej wizytówki dziecka - imię nazwisko, wiek i krótką wypowiedź o swoich zainteresowaniach np. sport, gry itp.

2. Krótkie, spontaniczne nagranie kibicowskich przyśpiewek lub dopingu ulubionej drużyny piłkarskiej piłkarskiej.

Zgłoszenie proszę wysyłać poprzez formularz:

https://form.jotform.com/261513807079056

**ZGŁOSZENIA PROSIMY PRZESYŁAĆ D0 7 CZERWCA.**

**EWENTUALNE ZDJĘCIA PRÓBNE ODBĘDĄ SIĘ 13-14 CZERWCA W WARSZAWIE.**

sharedPost.text:
POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: 
Seniorzy z charakterem (80+) 

Do wyjątkowej artystycznej sesji zdjęciowej  operatora nominowanego do Oscara poszukujemy osób w wieku 80 lat i więcej (rocznik 1930 - 1940)
Szukamy twarzy z historią – autentycznych, naturalnych i zbalansowanych życiowym doświadczeniem. Interesuje nas czyste, prawdziwe piękno dojrzałego wieku, dlatego szukamy osób, które wyglądają naturalnie na swój wiek.
Twarze naturalne, z widocznymi zmarszczkami i unikalnym wyrazem (bez zabiegów medycyny estetycznej zmieniających rysy twarzy)

Masz w rodzinie babcię, dziadka, ciocię lub sąsiada, którzy idealnie pasują do tego opisu? A może to właśnie Ty chcesz wziąć udział w tym projekcie? Pokażmy razem piękno dojrzałości!

📩 **JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?**
Wyślij zgłoszenie na adres e-mail: 
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com
wpisując w tytule SENIOR

- Imię, nazwisko oraz wiek.
- Aktualne, wyraźne zdjęcie twarzy (w naturalnym świetle, bez filtrów!) 
- Numer telefonu do kontaktu

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

items.text:
COMMERCIAL CASTING CALL- Looking for Male Youth Swimmers, or swim team! Ages 8-15 years old.

My name is Taylor Long, and I'm a Casting Associate with Sean Milliken Casting.

We're currently casting an upcoming insurance commercial and are looking for male youth swimmers, approximately 8–15 years old. We're hoping to cast a full swim team, with opportunities for both featured extras and background roles.

I have a document with more information about the project, including filming dates and details on how parents or guardians can get in touch if they're interested in learning more. Please reach out!

We'd greatly appreciate it if you could share this opportunity with any swimmers or families who may be interested. It could be a fun and exciting experience for young athletes!

Thank you so much for your time and support. If you have any questions, please feel free to reach out, I’d be happy to help!

The financial rates are, if booked as an extra- $300.00 per person or, if upgraded to a featured extra, $2,500 per person.

Warm regards,

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING CALL – BACKGROUND ACTORS NEEDED FOR INDIE FEATURE FILM** 🎬

We're looking for **2 volunteer background actors** for a scene in an independent feature film shooting at **Stanley Park**.

**Roles Needed:**
• 1 Female (Age 30–60)
• 1 Male (Age 30–60)
• Ethnicity: Caucasian 

📍 **Location:** Stanley Park, Vancouver
📅 **Date:** June 6, Saturday.
🕒 **Call Time:** 3:00 PM, the shoot will be done in 2hrs.

*Please note that the shooting time may change slightly on the day. We will keep selected participants updated, so please be available and keep your phone nearby.*

**Scene Description:**
Our lead characters are trying to take a selfie together when two friendly passersby offer to help by taking the photo. It's a simple, fun interaction with a small amount of on-camera presence.

• **Volunteer** position
• **Film credit** provided
• **Craft services** (snacks and refreshments) provided

If you're interested, please send us a message with your head shot, showreel, name and age at **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**. Feel free to share this post with anyone who may be a good fit!

**Submission deadline 6th June 2026, 12pm.**

Thank you for supporting independent filmmaking! 🎥

items.text:
It took 40 years, but I made it! I am in New York, New York! Yes, I slayed my audition on Saturday,  June 6, 2026 for Acting and Modeling with two bars of singing in my monologue with W Talent! Now I am just chilling and enjoying the city! 

Backstory I was invited to an  audition at 19 and my Dad said "No!" I respected that. Rest in peace, Dad. Forty years later, I was invited to an audition, I said "Yes!" So happy to finally make it to this big city! Thank you, God for giving me a second chance.  Love y'all. 

(Side note for Dermotologists and Cosmetologists, if you recognize the skin rash on my face - please help. I have noticed other women my age with it too. Hopefully it is not age related. Anyway help if you know what it is. My doctors are baffled, even after a biopsy. God bless.)

Skilled Trades & Labor:
Mechanics, Construction Workers, Welders, etc

Civil & Community Heroes: Firefighters, Judge, Police or Detective, Mail Carriers / Couriers

Athletes & Performers:

 Sports Players (Track & Field, Softball, Basketball, etc.)

 Meals Provided on Set

Join us on set and help bring this vision to life!

items.text:
CASTING CALL
A non-union Black sapphic narrative short film about loss, love, and the rich cultural spiritual traditions that process it all.

Shoots in Detroit, late summer 2026, tentative Spring 2027

LEAD — CANEISHA, mid-40s to 50s, Black masc-presenting/stud/androgynous. Grief-stricken, but warm and entertaining before losing the love of her life.

LEAD — LOVIE, late 40s to 50s, Black, dark-skinned or medium-brown, femme-presenting, free-spirited and goofy, with a classic case of eldest sister syndrome that still resides in her. 

SUPPORTING — AFENI, mid-40s to 50s, Black, medium-brown or dark-skinned, masc-presenting, tender best friend, kind of a hippie. 

SUPPORTING — AZRAELIA, mid-30s to mid-40s, dark-skinned Black woman, witty younger sister, ambitious and trendy businesswoman. Ideally full-figured.

SUPPORTING — PAPA MONTGOMERY - late 70s to 90s, Black, if y'all don't get y'all grandfather involved in a film. Playful and lively. 

COMPENSATION: This is a microbudget project. Currently we can guarantee profit shares from the film, but we are working on honorariums for each principal role. We're also working on funding to hopefully assist with travel or lodging for non-locals.

HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a good quality photo, resume, age, a reel if you have one and interest to freedomdrumfilm@gmail.com and casting director MacKenzie Galloway at mackenziegallowayllc@gmail.com. Sides will be sent upon receipt. Supplemental dramatic and comedic monologues are welcome. 

Stay involved with the project @freedomdrumfilm.

View the casting call on Instagram and Backstage: 

https://www.instagram.com/p/DX6qXEEDmME/?igsh=Z2g4aWNkMmF3dDE3

https://www.backstage.com/casting/freedom-drum-3147338/

SUPPORTING — AZRAELIA, mid-30s to mid-40s, dark-skinned Black woman, witty younger sister, ambitious and trendy businesswoman. Ideally full-figured.

SUPPORTING — PAPA MONTGOMERY - late 70s to 90s, Black, if y'all don't get y'all grandfather involved in a film. Playful and lively. 

COMPENSATION: This is a microbudget project. Currently we can guarantee profit shares from the film, but we are working on honorariums for each principal role. We're also working on funding to hopefully assist with travel or lodging for non-locals.

HOW TO APPLY:

Submit a good quality photo, resume, age, a reel if you have one and interest to freedomdrumfilm@gmail.com and casting director MacKenzie Galloway at mackenziegallowayllc@gmail.com. Sides will be sent upon receipt. Supplemental dramatic and comedic monologues are welcome. 

Stay involved with the project @freedomdrumfilm.

View the casting call on Instagram and Backstage: 

https://www.instagram.com/p/DX6qXEEDmME/?igsh=Z2g4aWNkMmF3dDE3

https://www.backstage.com/casting/freedom-drum-3147338/

Icons Week is coming 10th-14th August ArtsEd ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Join the amazing team at Perform Now and the incredible Diantè Lodge, Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Hannah Dimtsu, Jacosta Almgil, Ben Harris and Hannah Taylor for an iconic week of fun, intense and high standard training/workshops led by the best in the biz. 

From the West End to Broadway our iconic lineup have done it all!! 

BOOK NOW!!! 

https://performnow.co.uk/icons-summer-week

See you there!
#performnow #icons #youngperformers #londonmums #performanceopportunities

items.text:
At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

#actingclass #cameratechniques #youngactors #screenacting

items.text:
VANCOUVER CASTING CALL: COURTING YOU

Project Type: BookTok/Teaser Trailer

**Compensation: Demo reel material (plus be a part of something fun!)**

**Ideal for actors looking to build romantic lead footage and on-screen chemistry scenes for their demo reel.**

Union Status: **Non-union performers only, please.**

Director/Casting Director: Brianne Hogan

Contact Information: brianne.hogan@gmail.com

Audition Location: Self-tape

Submission Deadline: **June 21, 2026**

Shooting Date: **July 11, 2026**

Shooting Location: Vancouver (TBD)

Shoot Length: Approximately 2–3 hours maximum. 

**SYNOPSIS**

Based on my upcoming e-book, Courting You, this contemporary romantic comedy follows Riley, a 40-year-old woman rebuilding her life after the end of a long-term relationship. Looking for a fresh start, she joins a local tennis club and unexpectedly falls for Hunter, the club's charming 23-year-old tennis instructor. What begins as an unexpected attraction quickly turns into something deeper as both struggle with the realities of their age gap, outside expectations, and the question of whether their connection is worth the risk.

**IMPORTANT NOTE**

Courting You is an age-gap romance between a woman in her 40s and a man in his 20s. Performers should be comfortable portraying romantic attraction, chemistry, and flirtation within this dynamic.

**SCENE BEING FILMED**

The trailer focuses on Riley and Hunter's first meeting at a tennis club. After Hunter accidentally hits Riley with a tennis ball, he rushes over to check on her. The attraction is immediate—until they realize he's the instructor and she's the student.

Tone: Romantic, playful, flirty, contemporary rom-com with strong chemistry and a touch of tension.

**CHARACTER BREAKDOWN**

RILEY (Lead) | Female | 38–45

Riley is a travel writer—independent, adventurous, and globally savvy. Having spent much of her life charting her own course, she's never followed the traditional path expected of women her age. Recently out of a long-term relationship, she's at a crossroads, questioning who she is and what she wants next.

Witty, quirky, and effortlessly relatable, Riley uses humour to navigate uncertainty. When she meets Hunter, what begins as an unexpected attraction quickly becomes something more, forcing her to reconsider the future she thought she wanted.

Personality: Intelligent, warm, self-aware, dry sense of humour, emotionally guarded but hopeful.

HUNTER (Lead) | Male | 22–27

Hunter is a former elite junior tennis player who walked away from his professional ambitions to pursue a law degree. Freshly graduated, he's caught between the life he's always been told he should want and the freedom he's beginning to crave.

Responsible, level-headed, and naturally caring, Hunter has spent most of his life meeting expectations—particularly those of his parents. Beneath his calm exterior is someone eager to experience adventure, take risks, and discover who he is outside of everyone else's plans for him.

Meeting Riley awakens a side of himself he's never fully explored.

Personality: Confident but grounded, compassionate, dependable, mature beyond his years, quietly charismatic.

Requirements: Must be comfortable and believable playing an experienced tennis player. Strong tennis skills preferred. Height 6'0"+. Must be comfortable appearing shirtless for portions of the shoot.

CHEMISTRY BETWEEN LEADS

Riley and Hunter share an immediate, undeniable connection. Their dynamic is playful, flirtatious, and emotionally authentic, with strong romantic tension.

Casting Note: Chemistry between leads is the most important element of this project. Performers should be able to convey attraction, warmth, humour, and emotional depth with minimal dialogue.

**TO SUBMIT**
** Please send the following to: brianne.hogan@gmail.com**

**• Headshot**
** • Resume (if available)**
** • Recent photo(s)**
** • Brief note outlining any tennis experience**
** • Demo reel (optional)**
** • Optional: a short introduction telling us why you're interested in the role**

**Subject Line: *****Courting You – [Riley / Hunter]***

📣CASTING CALL📣
DEADLINE EXTENDED: JUNE 12TH

Actively looking for actors for our feature film— The Suit I Buried Her In.

Logline:

Mourning the death of his girlfriend, a Chinese-Canadian college student must confront his family’s cultural shame and the slow, painful journey of accepting himself before anyone else.

THIS IS AN UNPAID, NON-UNION FILM FUNDED BY THE DIRECTORS THEMSELVES.

Email us your CV, portfolio, or self-tape to tsibhi.2026@gmail.com

Calling Original Monologues and Poetry!
HACH is having its first summer fundraiser to get to Nanaimo Fringe!

We’d love to use this opportunity to showcase original work from Vancouver artists in true HACH fashion!

We want to hear what you have to say right now.

Info below❤️✨

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

Tancerki potrzebne do obłędnej ekipy Tancerze PL - najbliższe zlecenia 6, 13 czerwca 2026. Narazie szukamy osób dostępnych w czerwcu które już z nami tańczyły (!!!) - w tym wypadku dzwońcie do Sylwii: 602406111 . 

Inne Tancerki i Tancerze, którzy chcieliby dołączyć do grupy na stałe - wkrótce ogłosimy casting. Jeśli chcesz się zgłosić już teraz - zaobserwuj naszego instagrama i skomentuj ten post. Następnie wyślij zgłoszenie przez grupa@tamcerze.pl . 

Zlecenia są choreograficzne (Tancerki klubowe, gogo dancers, fordanserki - nie dadzą rady) - próby (na tę chwilę) wyłącznie w Warszawie. Opcjonalnie osoby z 3miasta i okolic.

Uwaga, wyłącznie osoby wszechstronne tanecznie z dobrymi podstawami tańca jazzowego lub klasycznego lub towarzyskiego. Tylko osoby z klasą, i eleganckim, naturalnym wyglądem (przesadnie usta, botox itp - to nie nasza estetyka) 

PS. Jeśli tańczysz tylko high heels, sambę, bachate… dowolną wąską specjalizację - a nie masz podstaw klasycznych - możesz spróbować, ale będzie ciężko dorównać do poziomu grupy. Zaobserwuj nas i poczekaj na casting

⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director

The Dinner Detective is currently casting!

All roles paid and scheduling happens one month at a time based on your availability!

To be considered for the virtual audition, you must email your pic and resume to dinnerdetectiveauditions@gmail.com with your audition city in the subject line. If selected, you will then receive a character breakdown, show pay details and an audition form to fill out and send back.

#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair

items.text:
Hope Among The Cosmos Student Film Deadline Extension (June 10th, Wed)
CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th), with a possible pick-up shot date in early October (TBA).

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

XANDER — Male, 30s-40s
The father. Big presence, quiet intensity, he carries a lot of weight but doesn't talk about. Physical role, but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA — Female, 12-15
Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

YOUNG XANDER — Male, 8-11
A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial. 

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com

Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]
Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. and request the sides, and they will be sent immediately.

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

@everyone We're urgently looking for **experienced gymnasts** for an exciting upcoming production in **London**.

This is a **fantastic opportunity to be part of an amazing production** and is a **paid role**.

**Important:** Applicants must be between **5'7" and 5'10"** as this role is for a **body/ stand in  double for a well -known artist **.

Please share with anyone suitable in your network.

If interested, please send your details, recent photos, height, and any relevant gymnastics or stunt experience.

We'd love to hear from you! 🎬🤸‍♀️🤸‍♂️#**gymnasts #castingcall #marksummerscasting #marksummers #castingcall **#ukcasting

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — LONDON | TRAVEL EXPENSES PAID
ROOM FOR THOUGHT — Episode 1

We're looking for real people with real opinions 

for a brand new UK filmed conversation series 

launching on TikTok and YouTube.

The format is simple — we read out a statement, 

you step forward if you agree, stay back if you 

disagree. Then we talk about it. No script. 

No acting. Just you and your honest opinion.

Episode 1 topic: Modern Relationships & Dating

Statements include:

• "Dating apps have ruined modern romance"

• "Men and women can never fully understand each other"

• "You can love someone and still cheat on them"

✅ All backgrounds and opinions welcome.

✅ 18+

✅ Filmed in a professional London studio

✅ Published on TikTok and YouTube

✅ Travel expenses covered

✅ Just be yourself

TO APPLY — comment below or DM us with:

1. Your name and age

2. One word that describes your dating life 😄

3. Your honest answer to: would you forgive cheating?

We respond to every application within 24 hours.

@roomforthoughtuk

🇬🇧 Real People. Real Perspectives.

items.text:
We are currently casting the role of Emila for our feature film "Last Resort" 

* **Emilia:**
Emilia has been kidnapped by smugglers and left stranded on an island where Mark has been isolated for years. Her brother’s body was also abandoned on the island prior to her arrival. This scene showcases Emilia's strength and vulnerability in the face of trauma. Playing age 23-35 years, Think Sasha from Apex 

**Key Information:**
* Filming dates End of Sept TBC if changes will let successful applications know. 
* **Filming Locations :**Thailand 
* **Accent:** Any accent is welcome.
* **Fee £150 **Per day, Plus Travel, Accommodation and Expenses.

Please note we will only audition those we are interested in seeing. this is not an open audition. If you previously auditioned for this role no need to apply as we would already have your audition on records. 

To apply please send headshots, spotlight to hello@aptitudefilms.co.uk in subject please put Emilia. 

Best 
Marc Zammit

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — PAID — Older Male Actor for Short Film — Katy/Houston**

Hi everyone, I’m casting an older male actor for a paid short proof-of-concept film shooting in the Katy/Houston area.

We’re especially looking for someone with a grandfatherly presence, strong emotional range, and ideally some theatre experience.

**Project**: Short proof-of-concept film

**Shoot Date**: Friday, June 19 (night shoot)

**Location**: Katy / Houston area

**Compensation**: Paid

**Genre/Tone**: Dramatic, character-driven

The film centers on a charged meeting between a young man and an eccentric older poet inside a dark, atmospheric study.

**CASTING: EDMUND**

Looking for an older male actor, playing age roughly **60–80**.

Edmund is a warm, eccentric, theatrical older poet — grandfatherly, charming, funny. He can be childlike and playful in one moment, then suddenly shift into accusation, wounded anger, and passionate intensity.

This is a very performance-driven role with a lot of emotional shifts — from humor and playfulness to volatility and anger, and finally vulnerability. The role can be theatrical, but it should still feel human and truthful, not exaggerated or cartoonish.

This is a dialogue-heavy role and would be ideal for an actor with theatre experience, strong presence, and emotional depth.

**British accent required.**

Theatrical/classical background is a plus.

More information on the role and project: [https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford](https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford)

**TO APPLY**

Email preferred: [your email]

Subject line: EDMUND— [Your Name]

Please include:

Name

Role/position you’re applying for

Location

Relevant experience

Actor headshot/reel/resume, or crew reel/website/credits

Availability on June 19

DMs are also okay, and referrals are very welcome — especially for older actors with theatre experience.

Project website for more context: junipervalleyfilm.com

Thank you!
items.previewDescription: A role of theatrical force and hidden grief. Playful, volatile, tender, and wounded, Malcolm is a man whose theatricality hides a genuine ache. “The Temple of Peace” Malcolm’s study is the outward expression of his inner life. It is within this room that the film’s central confrontation unfo...

🚗 AUSTIN, TX CASTING CALL 🚗
Are you local to the Austin area? Do you have a valid drivers license and a car? Put those to good use and submit to our casting!!

*CASTING REAL PEOPLE* (non-union) for a commercial that will film in the Austin area. We are interviewing real people on their opinions, as well as filming them driving their cars. Must be comfortable driving on camera in both highway and residential areas.

DEMO: All ages (18+), genders, and ethnicities are encouraged to apply.

PAYMENT: $500, for a half day of cruising - 4-5 hours total. *Must be able to fill out payroll/I-9 paperwork*

Film Usage: Online, Digital, and New Media

Territory: Domestic and Global

Usage Term: In-Perpetuity

🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE SUPPORTING LEAD ROLE (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Independent comedy short film is seeking a Latina actress or an actress who can portray a Latin woman for the role of Sofia filming in Miami, FL.

ROLE: SOFIA
Female, 40s or older preferred. Confident, lively, flirtatious, and larger than life. Sofia has a strong screen presence with expressive reactions and natural comedic instincts. The role contains minor dialogue but strong comedic visual scenes and physical comedy throughout.

Must be comfortable wearing high heels and appearing significantly taller than the male lead (5’5”). Preferred if actress is 5’7” or taller.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Location: Miami, Florida
📅 Shoot Date: June, Exact date TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY (Must not be SAG-AFTRA)
• Strong comedic timing, facial expressions, and physical comedy skills
• Confident, charismatic on-camera presence
• Salsa or basic dance ability is a plus 
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Reel and/or video sample REQUIRED

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot, reel and/or video sample, and current location to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Sofia Submission

Serious and available talent only.

Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 24/2026

DER ERSTE KONTAKT? DOKU ÜBER EINEN KULTFILM SOWIE 2 UNTERSCHIEDLICHE INTERVIEWS

Was wäre, wenn du herausfinden würdest, dass wir nicht allein sind? Angenommen, jemand könnte dir das beweisen: Hättest du Angst? Kultregisseur Steven Spielberg gibt uns nicht nur eine Wortspende, sondern stellt auch gleich selbst seinen Film DISCLOSURE DAY vor.

AUSSER ATEM gehört zweifellos zu den großen Filmklassikern. Doch was ist die Geschichte dahinter? NOUVELLE VAGUE wirft einen Blick auf die Dreharbeiten von Jean-Luc Godards bahnbrechendem Krimidrama – mit viel Liebe zum Detail, zahlreichen Verweisen und Humor.

Ebba Sinzinger ist eine bekannte österreichische Regisseurin, Drehbuchautorin und Filmproduzentin, die in Wien lebt und arbeitet. Sie ist vor allem für ihre engagierten Dokumentarfilme  vielen ein Begriff. Hinsichtlich ihres neuesten Filmes DIE KUNST KOMPLIZEN konnten wir mit ihr ein Interview führen.

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel.Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

Abgerundet wird das einstündige Magazin mit Songs aus Filmen der letzten 80 Jahre.

Mittwoch 10.6.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
🎬 **1 Day Adult Intro to the American Accent — Brisbane**
*An intensive with Sandra Bell*

Learn from one of Australia's most experienced dialect coaches — and walk away with showreel footage.

📅 **Saturday 27 June 2026**
🕙 **10am – 4:30pm**
📍 **Queensland Headshots, 1192 Stanley St East, Coorparoo QLD**
💵 **$260 standard | $240 returning students** (GST inc.)

**What's included:**
* Hands-on American accent coaching: placement, rhythm and the sounds that give it away
* Targeted exercises that build the accent into your body, not just your ear
* Performance work with scenes on their feet, under real pressure
* A filmed US accent scene captured on the day
* A green screen newsreader scene, edited and delivered
* Showreel-ready footage you can submit straight away

Mythological • Science Fiction • Horror

Do you love epic storytelling, powerful characters, ancient mythology, and supernatural suspense?

Trilokam Entertainment is seeking talented actors and performers for an exclusive Zoom table read of an upcoming feature-length Mythological Science Fiction Horror film.

 Indian Actors Preferred  All experience levels welcome  Opportunity to explore unique and compelling characters  Network with fellow actors and creatives

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 DATE June 21, 2026

 TIME 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM

 LOCATION Zoom (Link provided upon selection)

 FORMAT • Complete script read-through • Two full readings of the screenplay • Character exploration and discussion

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 SEEKING ACTORS WHO CAN BRING TO LIFE: • Heroes and Heroines • Mythological Figures • Warriors and Sages • Villains and Supernatural Beings • Modern and Futuristic Characters

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 INTERESTED?

TO:

trilokamentertainment@gmail.com

"Ancient Powers. Future Worlds. Unspeakable Horrors."

Presented by TRILOKAM ENTERTAINMENT

Spaces are limited. Submit today to reserve your opportunity to participate.

Casting Call
Hi, I am the sole creator of a horror analogue series called The Haven Archivist. I am looking for 3 male actors and 1 female actress to fill certain characters. Project details: any scripts sent need to be filmed in a self tape format, project is unpaid. Please email me at Thehollowreturn@outlook.com if interested

Characters: 

Subject 7714 (Finch). Male, early 20s

Nigel Harrow. Current version of the main antagonist, late 40s, White

Kerion Marsh, brother of a missing journalist, late 20s to early 30s

Marian Scargill, director of Haven in the 90s, female, age late 30s to 40s

There will be other roles available as well

items.text:
Paid Casting Call
🎬 CASTING CALL – FATHER’S DAY COMMERCIAL

We are casting for a heartfelt Father’s Day commercial filming in East London.

⸻

⚽ NICK (Child, Playing Age 6–12)

Nick is a football-loving child who dreams of one day playing on the world’s biggest stages. Training is not always easy, and setbacks are part of the journey, but Nick never gives up. No matter what happens, they know their father will always be there to support them.

Requirements:

✅ Any gender

✅ Any ethnicity

✅ Playing age 6–12

✅ Basic football skills (comfortable dribbling, passing, and shooting)

✅ Must have football boots/trainers and suitable sportswear for filming

✅ Comfortable following direction on set

✅ Natural and confident on camera

⸻

🚖 JEREMY (Male, Playing Age 28–45)

Jeremy is a ride-hailing driver and lifelong football enthusiast. Although he never fulfilled his own football dream, he now dedicates his time and energy to helping his child pursue theirs. He is not a man of many words, but through his presence, encouragement, and countless fist bumps, he shows unwavering support and love.

Requirements:

✅ Any ethnicity

✅ Playing age 28–45

✅ Strong natural and emotional acting ability

✅ Must hold a valid driving licence and be comfortable driving on camera

✅ Must have well-fitted sportswear and trainers suitable for filming

✅ Warm, approachable, and believable fatherly presence

✅ Football experience or interest is a plus

⸻

📍 Location: Stratford / Canary Wharf / Isle of Dogs area, East London (TBC)

📅 Shoot Date: 13–15th (one day within this window, TBC)

🎥 Project: A heartfelt Father’s Day commercial about family, encouragement, and chasing dreams through football.

⸻

To apply, please send:

• Recent photos/headshots

• Age

• Location

• Acting experience (if any)

• Contact details

📩 Please DM for further details or tag someone who may be suitable for these roles.

E-mail：wangxueshijia2023@hotmail.com

⭐ Real father-and-child pairs are encouraged to apply and may be given priority, although individual applications are equally welcome.

Serious enquiries only. 🎬⚽❤️

items.text:
MODEL CASTING CALL – JOIN AN EXCITING FASHION CAMPAIGN

Hello!

We are delighted to invite talented and passionate models to be part of an exciting new fashion project. Our client is launching an innovative online fashion website and catalog featuring her latest designer collections, and we are looking for exceptional individuals to help bring this vision to life.

### Opportunities Available

We are currently seeking:

- Fashion Models (Male & Female)
- Novice & professional models 

This project will feature a variety of creative concepts, including:

Outdoor Fashion Editorials

- Luxury cityscapes
- Beautiful gardens and parks
- Beach and waterfront fashion shoots
- Lifestyle and street-style photography

Fantasy & Creative Fashion Concepts

- Elegant fairy-tale inspired looks
- High-fashion fantasy themes
- Artistic designer campaigns
- Dramatic evening wear photography

### Fashion Categories

- Maxi Dresses
- Midi Dresses
- Mini Dresses
- Designer Evening Wear
- Jeans
- Pants
- Jackets
- Male & Female Fashion Collections

### Model Requirements

Female Models

- Minimum Height: 5'5"
- Wear black leggings, vest top, and heels (no wedges)

Male Models

- Minimum Height: 5'8"
- Wear jeans, t-shirt, and shoes

### General Requirements

- Age: 17–40 years
- All ethnicities are encouraged to apply
- Both experienced and aspiring models are welcome

### Event Details

Dates: 26th-27th of June 
Time: 3:00 PM – 5:00 PM

### Compensation

£2,500 for both days

### Additional Benefits

- Professional portfolio-building opportunities
- Promotion across Instagram and Facebook platforms
- Exposure to fashion brands and industry professionals
- Networking and career development opportunities

We are building a creative team of passionate individuals to launch a remarkable fashion collection, and we would love for you to be part of this exciting journey.

If you are interested, kindly reach out via email:

Email: kristentravis560@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you and creating something extraordinary together.

items.text:
CASTING CALL: ARE YOU SCOTLAND’S NEXT STAGE STAR?

🎭 CALEDONIA HIGH: THE MUSICAL 🎭

Think 'High School Musical' meets 'Braveheart'!

An exciting, brand-new original musical is being made right here in Scotland, and SJS Productions (supported by Jazzart Charitable Trust and your local Lanarkshire councils) wants YOU to be in the cast!

Caledonia High follows the high-energy adventures, rivalries, and dreams of students at a competitive Scottish performing arts school. If you love to sing, dance, act or play an instrument, this is your chance to shine in a professional theatre environment led by industry directors.

Who are we looking for?

We have three audition groups available. Don't worry if you've never performed professionally—we want to see your skill, energy and passion!

• Junior Ensemble: 9 years +

• Senior Ensemble: 11 years +

• Principal (Lead) Roles: 14 years +

Where & When – OPEN Auditions and Casting takes place:

📍 EAST KILBRIDE – Junior Ensemble 9 years+ & Senior Ensemble 11 Years+

o Date: Sunday, June 28th – 11am

o Venue: The Village Theatre

📍 AIRDRIE – Principles 14 years+

o Date: Monday, June 29th – 11am 

o Venue: Airdrie Town Hall

⚠️ CONTACT US NOW TO SIGN UP:

Ask a parent or guardian to email contact@jazzartuk.com or visit @caledoniahigh2026 for more details

Secure your spot and don't miss out on being part of Scotland’s next massive musical hit!

August Rehearsal Dates TBC

items.text:
# **CASTING CALL - RATTLE **

We're casting two small low-speaking paid roles for *Rattle*, our NFTS graduation short film shooting in West Ealing and Wembley this summer. The film follows a young homeless woman, Charli, through one desperate night in London.

**AKSHAR'S MOTHER** - Female, 40-80s.

*South Asian (preferred, though all ethnicities welcome). Watches disapprovingly from a balcony as her son conducts a late-night transaction on the street below with Charli. Shoot date: Saturday 4 July (half day) - Wembley.  *

**PARK DRIFTER WITH DOG** - Gender open, 18+.

*A member of a loose community of misfits who hang around a West Ealing playground - drinking, joking, looking out for each other. Must have your own dog and be happy to bring them to set / be on camera. All breeds welcome, the scruffier the better. Shoot date: Thursday 2 July (half day), West Ealing.*

**FEE:** £71 (half day rate) + travel allowance. 

The film contains references to drug use and adult themes. Nothing will be required beyond what is described above.

To apply, please email **[rattlefilm@gmail.com](mailto:rattlefilm@gmail.com)** with a photo of yourself, your Mandy/Spotlight link if applicable, and (for the dog role) **a photo of your dog**.

Please confirm which role you're applying for and your availability for the relevant date.

topComments.text: Are you able to reply to submitted candidates?

Stawka: 400 zł netto 

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl
W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki castingowe (w przypadku braku, do wybranych osób wyślę do nagrania scenę ze scenariusza)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach lub Gliniarzach Śląsk

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
☠️ Listen up, ya landlubbers...

We're buildin' a cast. We're buildin' a crew. And we're buildin' a movie.

If you've ever wanted to act, run camera, make content, tell stories, or just be part of somethin' bigger than yourself...

Now's the time to climb aboard.

🎬 Tomorrow • 6:30 PM
📍 Colorado Media School

4380 S Syracuse St Suite 400, Denver, CO 80237

No fancy Hollywood nonsense.

Just good people makin' movies.

🌐 https://movieteam.site/

The tide waits for no pirate.

items.text:
BUILDING STAY LIVE

Design the Film • Play Along • Win Prizes

Ever wondered what it takes to turn a novel into a film?

Join us for a fun, interactive evening as we pull back the curtain on the STAY proof of concept and invite you into the filmmaking process.

Throughout the event, you'll help us make creative decisions, play along in live games, compete for prizes, and get an inside look at how we're bringing STAY from page to screen.

During the event we'll:

 Explore characters, locations, and visual ideas from the STAY universe

 Help design the world of STAY through live audience polls and discussions

 Learn what goes into creating a proof of concept and why we're making one

 Play "Guess the Budget" and see if you can correctly estimate real filmmaking costs

 Compete in fun character-based games and cast challenges

 Win STAY-themed prizes and exclusive digital goodies

 Learn how your support helps bring this story to life

Whether you've read the books, attended previous events, or are discovering STAY for the very first time, this event is designed to be interactive, entertaining, and welcoming to everyone.

Come play along, meet the team, and help us build the future of STAY.

 Date & Time:

June 8, 2026 @ 3pm PST, 4pm MST, 5pm CST, 6pm EST

 Platform:

Riverside

[https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl](https://riverside.com/studio/landons-studio-ikGYl?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExS0d0OE5nZnF5TWVnbmhtQ3NydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR44MxgWb1RLT3_qROaFO1BN_IdZFHqvF_4MH7cEmbEPLXvGoNQdRb5wzT8BFA_aem_vzQT1Q-jEiMSrBOcmfWERw)...

 Prizes Available Throughout the Event

 Supporting the STAY Proof of Concept

items.text:
GRAVE STAKES — OPEN CASTING CALL

Hey everyone! My name is Paul Dächert, I’m a Bachelor directing student at SAE Institute Munich, and I’m currently casting for my thesis film — and I’d love for you to be part of it.

THE FILM

Grave Stakes is a stylized Western dramedy set in a surreal frontier world where death is not an end, but a negotiation. A dying man embarks on a final journey back to his hometown with one goal: to take control over how his life ends. Along the way, a reluctant Death-in-training, a cynical grave digger, and a sharp-witted outlaw woman join him on a road that blends dark humor with existential depth.

Can we truly control how our story ends — or is that the one thing we must learn to let go?

📍 Munich, Germany · 🎬 Sep 10–13, 2026 · 🗣 Filmed in English
💰 No budget · Full catering on set · Showreel footage · Festival submission

THE ROLES

We are currently casting the following five roles:

🤠 Will O’Die — Lead
Male · 30–50 · Black / Afro-descendant
A man at the edge of his life. Dry-witted, quietly stubborn, and carrying both dark humor and real emotional weight. His journey isn’t about survival — it’s about authorship.

🌵 Gloria Sorrow — Lead
Woman · 22–32 · All backgrounds welcome
The sharpest person in every room. Self-possessed, funny, with real warmth underneath the armor. The film never comments on her being a woman. By the end, she’s Sheriff.

💀 Ashford Reaper — Supporting Lead
Open · 25–45 · All backgrounds welcome · ⚠️ British accent essential
Death. In training. Charming, earnest, and reliably incompetent in the most endearing way. The most human character in the film — and the funniest.

🃏 Quinn Alistor — Supporting
Open · 35–55 · All backgrounds welcome
A loveable rogue who would pickpocket Death himself. Runs on charm and self-interest — mostly. Somewhere underneath is one genuine act of kindness that matters more than he’d ever admit.

✝️ The Priest — Supporting
Open · 40–65 · All backgrounds welcome
Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

Rides in unannounced, finds a practice funeral in progress, and steps up to officiate without missing a beat. One scene. One speech. The whole film hinges on it.

HOW TO APPLY

📅 Deadline: July 10, 2026
📩 dachertpaul@gmail.com

Please send:
→ A ~1 minute video in English: your name, age, location, and why a specific role speaks to you
→ A headshot
→ CV & showreel welcome, but not required

Fluent English required. Native speaker preferred — but what matters most is that you feel at home in the language.

We are committed to inclusive casting and warmly encourage actors from all backgrounds to apply. All experience levels welcome. Presence and truth over credits. ❤️

#GraveStakes #CastingCall #ShortFilm #StudentFilm #SAEMunich #OpenCall #CastingGermany #ActorsOfInstagram #WesternFilm #FilmMunich

items.text:
DOCUMENTARY CASTING!

Casting a doc about deepfakes. It's aimed to focus on human impact-the trauma, confusion, and how people are coping or pushing back.

Who I’m looking for:

-Young people whose faces were used in deepfake videos, school bullying, or revenge

-influencers or content creators who have had their likeness misused 

-anyone hit by deepfake scams

-survivors who are speaking out or rebuilding 

-activists or anyone fighting against this, organizations aimed to combat or raise awareness or offer support of any kind

Stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com if you think you’re a fit- email me a little bit about yourself and your story and lets chat!  

Interviews are Paid, one hour long, and will shoot 7/22-24 in Los Angeles (flexible scheduling) No travel budget, LA locals only 

Thank you!

items.text:
CREW CALL

Hello everyone! Valerie Ibarra here! I’m still looking to fill several positions for my upcoming faith based film, ‘Discernment’. 

Although I would love to pay everyone (each of you are definitely worth the pay), unfortunately, this will all be volunteer. I’m aware that asking anyone to commit is a lot to ask, however, it’s difficult to find people at the very last minute. So if you’re willing to not only volunteer but also commit, please send in your submission along with a resume. Or if you happen to know anyone looking to gain the experience, please send them our way. We would love to have ALL positions filled by end of June. I truly appreciate everyone in advance. Details of the project are as follows: 

CREW CALL-DISCERNMENT

TITLE: Discernment, Feature film 

PAY: Unpaid (All roles volunteer), IMDb credit, Food/snacks/refreshments 

NOTES: Faith based, comical, drama, emotional, 

CREW:
2 – PA’S
1 – Sound/Boom operator
1 – Grip

DATES: August 20-23, August 28-29 

LOCATION(S):  Seattle/Tacoma (Exact Location TBD)

ALTERNATE DATE: September 4-6, 2026

USAGE: Film Festivals, Web, possible streaming platforms

UNION: Non-Union

COMPANY: IbaRuba Productions

PRODUCER/DIRECTOR: Valerie Ibarra

SUBMISSION: 
Initial: Email a resume to ibarubaproductions@gmail.com  
Subject Line: 
Attn. Discernment Crew Call

Additional Notes: NDA is required prior to receiving entire script

topComments.text: Try your family and friends. Are you paying for equipment. Then pay for your crew & talent.

We will review all submissions and be in touch.

items.text:
Hi! I am a Brazilian professional model with experience in fashion, commercial, and creative photography. I am currently spending a short period of time in Poland, based in the Cieszyn area, but I am available to travel to Kraków, Warsaw, and other nearby locations.

I am primarily looking opportunities; however, I am also open to collaborating on high-quality photo shoots that can enhance my portfolio and involve experienced professionals.

Please feel free to contact me if you believe we could be a good match for a project.

items.text:
PAID SPOKESPERSON CASTING – VANCOUVER

We're casting an on-camera spokesperson for a series of professional educational videos in the financial services industry.

We're looking for someone who feels natural, relatable, trustworthy, and authentic on camera. The ideal candidate should have a warm presence and be comfortable delivering scripted content in a conversational, approachable way.

Project Details

Presenter / spokesperson role

Speaking role

4-hour shoot

Compensation: $500

Filming in the Vancouver area

Videos will be used across website, marketing, sales, onboarding, and educational materials

What We're Looking For

Male or female

Approximately 35–55 years old

Strong communication skills

Comfortable speaking directly to camera

Natural, everyday appearance preferred over a traditional commercial/model look

Previous on-camera experience is an asset but not required

To Apply

Please send:

Recent headshot or photos

A short self-tape (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself and delivering a few lines to camera

Send submissions to: colin@your-story.agency

Due to the volume of submissions, we will only be able to contact selected applicants. We sincerely appreciate everyone's interest and keep submissions on file for future opportunities.

topComments.text:
Hi Colin
What is the deadline to submit the audition tape?
do you have approx shooting dates?

sharedPost.text:
‼️UWAGA ŚLĄSK – Katowice i okolice‼️ 
🔥Gramy nowy serial kryminalny🔥 

Szanowni Państwo, serdecznie zapraszamy na plan filmowy. Realizujemy nowy serial - śląską wersję ogólnopolskiego hitu, który ma miliony widzów! Przed nami dwa ostatnie tygodnie grania!!  Obecnie poszukujemy:

💥GOŚCIE RESTAURACJI (20-60 lat)
Data: 15.06 / poniedziałek – 1 scena /
Miejsce: ZABRZE – gramy w ekskluzywnym miejscu 😉
Stawka: 150 zł
ZE ZGŁOSZEŃ WYBIERZEMY 2 EPIZODY MÓWIONE: 300 zł
/ zapraszamy więcej osób - mile widziane pary /

💥GOŚCIE KNAJPY (20-60 lat)
Data: 16.05 / wtorek – 1 scena 
Miejsce: KATOWICE - gramy obok Spodka 😊
Stawka: 150 zł
/ zapraszamy więcej osób /

💥PIŁKARZE  NA TRENINGU (18-26 lat)
Data: 17.06 / środa – 1 scena
Miejsce: Zabrze (oczywiście na stadionie) 
Stawka: 300 zł 
/ zapraszamy większą ilość panów – zgłoszenia grupami mile widziane 😉 /

💥ŚWIADKOWIE ZDARZENIA (20-60 lat)
Data: 18.06 / czwartek - 2 sceny
Miejsce: MIKOŁÓW
Stawka: 150 zł + będzie na co popatrzeć 😉

💲Stawki netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie💲 
(Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło)

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com
W tytule prosimy wpisać do jakiej roli się Państwo zgłaszają, np. „PIŁKARZ” lub „GOŚĆ 16.06”
 
📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy  :) 

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do danej roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" i lokacja są podawane dzień wcześniej. (Oczywiście, wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).

media.ocrText: May be an image of ‎text that says '‎کُو NOWY SERIAL KRYMINALNY Ostatnie 2- 2-tygodnie grania!! Goście restauracji. Data: 15.06 (poniedziałek) stawka: 150 zł /Ze zgłoszeń wybierzemy dwa epizody: 300 zł/ Goście knajpy. Data: 16.06 (wtorek) stawka: 150 zł Piłkarze na treningu. Data: 17.06 (środa) stawka: 300 zł Świadkowie zdarzenia. Data: 18.06 (czwartek) stawka: 150 Ptatne GOTÓWKĄ po planie!!! zł‎'‎
