items.text:
Für unseren Low-Budget Kinofilm „Unter Erfolg“ (AT) sind wir derzeit auf der Suche nach Komparsen aus Berlin und Umgebung. 

Drehzeitraum: 13.07. - 21.08.2026

Alter: 18 bis 55 Jahre

Geschlecht: w/m/d

Wohnort: Berlin und Umgebung

Gage: unbezahlt

Wichtig: Du musst nicht in dem gesamten Drehzeitraum verfügbar sein. Wir planen dich nach deiner Verfügbarkeit ein.

LOGLINE: Zwischen einem dominanten Trainer, der ihn zu formen versucht, und einer jungen Frau, die ihm eine andere Welt zeigt, steht ein junger Tischtennisspieler vor der Entscheidung: weiter funktionieren - oder endlich fühlen.

Meld dich gerne mit deinen Sperrterminen und einem Portrait bei untererfolg@gmail.com mit dem Betreff „Komparsen“.

Wir freuen uns auf dich!

items.text:
WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

items.text:
CASTING CALL — FEMALE LEAD ASK ◉ SEE | Horror Short Film | Santa Ana, CA

Looking for an actress to play AMY — late 20s, any ethnicity. A woman in a relationship that's already over in everything but words. Cold, distant, unknowable. The role requires sustained physical stillness, comfort with intimate staging, and the ability to project unease with minimal dialogue.

Visually ambitious psychological horror short. Festival-targeted. Strong treatment and script available upon request.

Shoot dates: July 11, 12, Santa Ana, CA.

Compensation: IMDb credit, reel copy, meals on set.

To submit: DM @taylorballfilms on Instagram.

All levels welcome · Ages 18+ · Refunds until July 2

items.text:
# CASTING CALL: "CASTAWAY" (Short Film)

**Project Type:** Short Film (LGBTQIA+ / Latinx Drama)

**Union Status:** Non-Union / Union

**Rate:** $250/Day (Estimated 3 days of filming)
**Language: **Spanish/English

**Location:** Chicago, IL

**Submission Deadline:** July 25, 2026
## ABOUT THE PROJECT

*Castaway* follows the story of Victor, a conservative man who makes the heartbreaking decision to cast out his teenage son, Jaime, due to his own traditional values and beliefs. When Victor begins to quietly question the beliefs that once defined him, he is pulled into a private reckoning. His marriage begins to crumble under the weight of his growing guilt and humanity.

## ROLES AVAILABLE
[SOFIA] — Main Talent
* **Ethnicity:** Latinx/ Latin America
* **Age Range:** 40–55 years old
* **Character Bio:** Sofia is the respected president of her parish council and carries herself with elegance, confidence, and authority. She is deeply devoted to her faith and community, often appearing composed and in control. Years ago, Sofia made a decision that fractured her relationship with her son. Her dedication to representing her faith and community has become both a source of strength and a shield against painful truths.
## KEY DATES & AUDITION INFO
* **Filming Timeline:** EST. 3 days total (Dates TBD and will be in either August, September, or October)
* **Audition Process:** Virtual callbacks for principal roles will be held via Google Meet.
## HOW TO APPLY

Please submit your headshot, resume, and reel via our Backstage submission link below:

[https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/](https://www.backstage.com/casting/castaway-3173616/)

*Local Chicago & Midwest talent is highly preferred.*

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'A FILMBY NATHAN NATHANL.MARQUEZ L. MARQUEZ CaRTaиa asta u An LGB LGBTQ+ away Shoft astaway AnLGBTQ+Short oy shom Film'

items.text:
After three years in Sydney, Left Leg Productions is thrilled to be back on British soil with Weird West-End! Co-Produced with The Stage Door we’ll be bringing you your favourite musical theatre anthems in weird and wonderful ways on the 8th August. 
Have you been desperate to sing a gender swapped duet with your friend or show the world your Hamilton rap skills? Fancy yourself a female Fagin or adult Annie? Now is the time. Join us as we raise funds for Southampton Pride and celebrate our love of theatre.

EOI Form link - 

https://tr.ee/CsNQvGqueY

items.summary:
After three years in Sydney, Left Leg Productions is thrilled to be back on British soil with Weird West-End! Co-Produced with The Stage Door we’ll be bringing you your favourite musical theatre anthems in weird and wonderful ways on the 8th August. 
Have you been desperate to sing a gender swapped duet with your friend or show the world your Hamilton rap skills? Fancy yourself a female Fagin or adult Annie? Now is the time. Join us as we raise funds for Southampton Pride and celebrate our love of theatre.

EOI Form link - 

https://tr.ee/CsNQvGqueY

items.text:
CASTING CALL – FEATURE FILM (CINEMA). 

Project title to be announced. Shoot begins August (exact dates for each characterTBC). 
Day rate £300 + expenses covered. 

Contact: Farhan Baqi 
farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk
Please send a couple of photographs or a Spotlight link. 

It is extremely important to mention the character name you are applying for in the subject line of the email please (Makes my life easier 😛 )

I would like to add that most of the below characters have decent amount of dates, these are not one or two liners roles and therefore looking for experienced / trained actors 

Roles: 

LIZ (18–24): (Ginger hair)
One of the key characters on this production.
Fun, confident British Caucasion girl with ginger hair and an outgoing personality. Loyal, courageous, protective of friends. Must have a Birmingham or surrounding‑area accent (or be able to perform one). Musical background a plus but not essential. 

IMRAN – BAND MEMBER (18–24): 
Imran is of Indian origin, must be able to speak Hindi. Energetic, creative young man recently moved to the UK. Passionate about music and community. Warm, expressive personality.

ANDRE – BAND MEMBER (18–24): 
Black / African British Third‑generation Caribbean Brit with charisma and rhythm. Natural performer with strong musical energy. Musical background ideal. 

SAMEER (18–24): 
Indian origin, Quiet, must be able to speak Hindi. thoughtful young man from Birmingham with glasses and a gentle nature. Introverted but empathetic. Knowledge of underground music scene helpful. 

ALEX (45–50): 
British / Caucasion  Stylish, articulate British choir director. Commands authority and carries emotional depth. Musical background would be great plus point

SATPAL SINGH – (40–55): 
Indian origin, must be able to speak Hindi. Respected figure from Birmingham’s Punjabi community. Charismatic, warm, principled. Strong emotional range required.

Thank you

Hi! I'm casting for a PAID GIG in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Seeking *REAL* ALLSTATE customers.

PAID • Non Union • Commercial

Dates: 1 shoot day June 23-27 OR Week of July 6, 2026

Must be local in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Are you an Allstate customer who can speak about one of the below experiences?

- Switched from another provider for Home or Auto insurance and saved money

- Purchased Allstate Home Insurance directly through Allstate

- Purchased Allstate Rental Insurance

- Purchased and Experienced Using Allstate Roadside Assistance

- Purchased Allstate Auto Insurance and Roadside Assistance as a bundle

If you are one of the above, apply by filling out the form here: https://rb.gy/miv3i8

sharedPost.text:
AUDITION CALL: East London DramaFest 2026

Sign up link: cutt.ly/GFGsignup

He was untouchable. The game show's brightest star. And then she walked back in. Followed by an "accident" that nobody saw coming.

JDG East London Theatre is proud to present Master Jonjon's new play: "Game Fillet Game: A Dive into Influencing Careers… Uninvented Jobs… Surprise Missions…". And we want you to be part of it.

Know more about the story: cutt.ly/GFGstory

Opening to all skill levels, whether you have trodden the boards for decades or are just stepping onto a stage, JDG East London Theatre is calling for passionate, courageous performers to join us. From early July, JDG is serving free masterclass workshops and rehearsals as a creative space to forge connections with fellow drama enthusiasts, develop your dramatic and technical craft, and discover entirely new corners of the theatrical world.

Your commitment need not consume your every waking hour. Depending on your role, you will be required to attend only the sessions that pertain to you, though you are always warmly welcomed to sit in on other departments and broaden your artistic horizons.

Cast we seek:
1. Nikawr, male, aged 20s-40s. Pen-pusher turned game show celeb.

2. Quailsea, female, aged 20s-40s. Heiress to a big company, eager to show she has what it takes.

3. AD, male, aged 20s-40s. Always helping others.

4. Showkeeper, aged 20s-60s. MC for a game show.

(A number of characters of all ages and gender are also available.)

JDG is a voluntary community theatre proudly rooted in the heart of East London.

The curtain rises. Sign up for your audition now: cutt.ly/GFGsignup.

.

.

#thingstodoinlondon #auditioning #londonplay #auditions #eastlondondrama #eastlondonplays #londontheatre #londonperformance #theatrelondon #eastlondontheatre #londonevents

items.text:
🎬Casting Call - Short Film - A Summer Swallowed by Sheep
A Graduate Short Film from the Kingston University MA Filmmaking Programme.

Genre: Drama         

Shooting Dates: 3 or 4 days in early July             

Location: London

Synopsis: Alyssa, the daughter of a farmer, wins a prize on a scratch card and plans to use the money to repair her violin. But when the scratch card is accidentally eaten by a sheep on the farm, both Alyssa and the sheep find themselves in trouble. In trying to fix the situation, Alyssa ends up paying a price she never expected.

Looking for:

🔹Alyssa (Lead)

     Alyssa is an 18-year-old farm girl who finds comfort and joy in playing the violin and caring for the farm’s sheep. Lively and optimistic, she has a gift for finding joy in small things.However, after experiencing disappointment and betrayal, Alyssa becomes more guarded and withdrawn. Through these challenges, she begins an important journey toward maturity and self-discovery.

     Requirements：

     Playing age: around 18 years old.

     🎻 Basic violin fingering skills are preferred. Advanced violin skills are not required, but the actor should be willing to learn and perform simple violin movements on screen.

🔹Maeve (Supporting)

     Maeve is a 25-year-old female farm worker. Worldly, pragmatic, and emotionally guarded, she keeps others at a distance and prioritises her own ambitions. Her growing bond with Alyssa reveals a warmer, more vulnerable side.

🔹Neil  (Supporting)

     Neil is a 45-year-old farmer and Alyssa’s father. Practical, hardworking, and emotionally reserved, he prioritises responsibility above all else. Though well-intentioned, his inability to express affection leaves Alyssa feeling unseen, reflecting the emotional divide between them.

 

🔸Please submit a headshot, a brief introduction, and details of any previous acting experience to:  jiazitongtracy@163.com  

🔸Reasonable travel expenses covered. Meals provided.

Produced by Keba entertainment together with Ushkzan streaming App 
We are looking for passionate, dedicated actors to bring this project to life
  About the series
This is a story about life pressure, the cruelty of life , ambition , greed and crime and a young mother’s response to it.
  Production Details
• Location: Johannesburg, South Africa
• Schedule: AUG –SEP  (Weekends ONLY)
• Professional status: no-name , no agency young actors
• Compensation: Negotiable [daily or  series based rate –based on role] ; cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a professional  team
  Audition Instructions
Please submit a self-taped audition[using your phone] . You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you.
Email: kebaentertainment@kebaaiworld.com
Subject Line: ACTOR: DR AMINA SERIES
  Character Breakdown
PLEASE SEE ATTACHED POSTER
•   Why Be Part of  DR AMINA [series]?
This is more than just a Series — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a the reality haunting, South Africans  today; So whether you’re a student , no-name cast building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, DR AMINA [series] offers a unique and professional experience.
  We’re excited to see what you can offer.
Submit your audition and join us.

items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

🎃🍂 Everland Fall Season Dancer Recruitment 🍂🎃

📅 Contract Period
From early August to the end of November (fall season)

🎯 Who We’re Looking For:
• Genres: ballet / jazz dance / street dance / sports dance / parkour / acrobatics / roller skating
• Special skills: combinations of dance and additional performance skills are highly preferred
• Requirements: minimum 1 year of experience in your field and relevant training/education
• Height:
• Men: 178–190 cm
• Women: 165–175 cm

💰 Salary:
• Before tax: 2,156,880 KRW

🏠 What We Provide:
• Round-trip airfare
• Shared dormitory accommodation (2 people per room)
• Two meals per day (Korean or international options)

📄 Application Materials:
• Profile
• Self-introduction video
• Original choreography video (up to 2 videos)
• Photos (full body / portrait / stage)
• Languages spoken
• For roller skating / acrobatics / special skills – must be specified

📌 How to Apply:
https://forms.gle/CUQfC7pRaqCik25N7

**CASTING CALL – Ulønnet kortfilm (Thriller)**
Vi søger to kvindelige skuespillere til en fiktiv thriller -kortfilm med titlen *“En dag i maj”*. Optagelserne forventes at foregå i 2 dage i af slutningen af juli eller begyndelse af august.

**Vi søger:**

* En birolle (ca. 20/ 25 år)

Af danske udseende. (Lyshåret)

* En kvindelige hovedrolle( ca.35/ 40 år) sydlandsk / brunette udseende (mørkt hår, brune øjne, / blå øjne )

Historien  hanlder om en stils fotograf, der en dag i en park imens er han er færd med at tage nogle billeder overvære et mord. 

**Praktisk info:**

** locations i en park København 

* Projektet er ulønnet

Kortfilmen er independant af en erfarne instruktør 

* 

Interesserede og seriøse ansøgere kan kontakte:

📧 amirrezazadeh104@gmail.com 

Med venlig hilsen

Amir

items.text:
THE BIGGEST MISTAKE WITH ACTING CLASSES YOU NEED TO KNOW
There’s a common problem in most acting training that no one really talks about.
And it’s what keeps a lot of actors STUCK for years, wasting time and money.

Most acting training focuses on FEEDBACK.

But feedback doesn’t make you a consistently better actor.

I was explaining this to an actor recently using a simple analogy.

If you’re trying to shoot a basketball into a hoop and you keep missing, it doesn’t help if someone just says “closer,” “more energy,” or “that wasn’t it.” 

What you need is the TECHNIQUE behind how to consistently get the ball through the hoop.

Acting is no different.

Actors don’t become bookable from one-off feedback.

Actors become bookable when they’re trained in a skill set that enables them to be exactly what casting directors are looking for in every audition.

For context, I’ve been working as an actor for 18 years across film, television, and stage.

My credits include series regular roles in two Netflix productions, six feature films in lead roles, Jersey Boys directed by Clint Eastwood, and Wendy Darling in ABC’s Once Upon a Time.

I’ve taken what works in practice and developed a structured approach that builds CONFIDENCE, CONSISTENCY, and ultimately leads to BOOKING work. 

I’m curious. Is this something you’ve noticed about acting classes too? Let me know in the comments below.👇🏻 

DM me “ACTING” if you’re putting in the work but not seeing consistent results, and want to understand the simple technique that gets you booked. 📩

items.text:
SWIMMING IN RED
A Psychological Thriller Series by Eneme Studios

Hello everyone,

My name is Elvira Nsibi Eneme, founder of Eneme Studios.

I’m currently building something from the ground up — a dream, a vision, and a creative space for passionate artists who want to grow together. While this project is currently low budget, I truly believe every great studio starts somewhere. I’m looking for dedicated actors and crew members who want to create powerful work, gain high-quality material for their reel/portfolio, and become part of a strong independent filmmaking team.

✨ PROJECT DETAILS

🎥 Project: “Swimming in Red”

Genre: Psychological Thriller / Suspense Series

📍 Filming Location: North Hollywood, Los Angeles

📅 Shooting Schedule: Mainly Sundays (starting June)

💰 Compensation: UNPAID / Collaborative (Low Budget)

What we offer:

• IMDb & screen credits

• Professionally edited footage for reels/portfolios

• Networking opportunities

• Creative collaboration

• Catering on set

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SWIMING IN RED

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎥 CREW CALL (STILL NEEDED)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

We are actively looking  for the following crew positions:

• Director of Photography (DP) / Cinematographer

Assistant DP / Camera Assistant

Sound Mixer / Sound

Sound Assistant

Assistant Director (AD)

Script Supervisor / Continuity

DIT (Digital Imaging Technician)

Colorist (Post-Production)

Art Department Assistant (Production Design / Props / Set Dressing)

Gaffer / Lighting Technician

Hair & Makeup / Costume

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Please email:

📧 enemestudios90@gmail.com

Include:

• Resume 

• Recent photos/headshots

• Reel, self-tape, portfolio or work Instagram (if any)

• Role/crew position you’re applying for

• Confirmation of Sunday availability

👉 CREW DP – Your Name

Thank you so much to everyone supporting independent cinema and new creators. Let’s build something unforgettable together. 🩸🎬

📅 Shooting Schedule: Mainly Sundays (starting June)

💰 Compensation: UNPAID / Collaborative (Low Budget)

What we offer:

• IMDb & screen credits

• Professionally edited footage for reels/portfolios

• Networking opportunities

• Creative collaboration

• Catering on set

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SWIMING IN RED

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎥 CREW CALL (STILL NEEDED)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

We are actively looking  for the following crew positions:

• Director of Photography (DP) / Cinematographer

Assistant DP / Camera Assistant

Sound Mixer / Sound

Sound Assistant

Assistant Director (AD)

Script Supervisor / Continuity

DIT (Digital Imaging Technician)

Colorist (Post-Production)

Art Department Assistant (Production Design / Props / Set Dressing)

Gaffer / Lighting Technician

Hair & Makeup / Costume

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Please email:

📧 enemestudios90@gmail.com

Include:

• Resume 

• Recent photos/headshots

• Reel, self-tape, portfolio or work Instagram (if any)

• Role/crew position you’re applying for

• Confirmation of Sunday availability

👉 CREW DP – Your Name

Thank you so much to everyone supporting independent cinema and new creators. Let’s build something unforgettable together. 🩸🎬
items.title: SWIMMING IN RED

items.text:
Hi everyone. I’d like to introduce myself. My name is Ryan scullion, i am 29 years old and i am from Blackpool. I have just today had my official last day at university where I will graduate in July with a Level 5 in acting. 

I have been apart of several shows whilst there and I don’t want this path to end. I’m still thinking of what to do, now that I will be graduating. 

I know I want to continue to be apart of productions and was posting in here in hopes for somebody to recommend places that are looking for male actors and are working towards a show that would be in front of live audience. I love to dance and consider myself to be able to move but might need little rehearsals. I want to keep myself busy and explore options that would be close and a great opportunity for myself. 

Hope you’re all having a lovely day and thank you for reading.

items.text:
**Our LIVE Actor Q&A.**

**No script. No presentation. Just real questions from actors and honest answers from us, KC and Donna-Marie.**

In this class we answer questions about:

🎬 Why talented actors aren't always booking
🎬 The difference between talent and skill
🎬 What casting directors are really looking for
🎬 How to know if you're making the right choices
🎬 What may be holding your career back right now

If you've ever wondered:

"Am I good enough?"

"Why am I auditioning but not booking?"

"What should I be working on next?"

There's a good chance we've answered it here.

**And if you're watching the replay...**

**Leave your question in the YouTube comments.**

**We read them, and we'll answer them.**

Watch the replay and ask away. 👇

[https://www.youtube.com/live/-HHye2Nx5HM?si=ziUy29SxM5q0b44Y](https://www.youtube.com/live/-HHye2Nx5HM?si=ziUy29SxM5q0b44Y)
